name: badge
label: Badge
description: A small label for status, counts and categories. Solid, soft status and outline variants in three sizes, with an optional icon and pill shape.

props.name: variant
props.description: The color treatment of the badge.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional component name to render as an icon (e.g. a Blade icon).

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Render the icon before or after the label.

props.name: pill
props.description: Use a fully rounded pill shape instead of the default rounded corners.
